title: support obsolete 3gl services
text: support obsolete 3gl services Respond to ulda and uopenflag set by user-defined 3GL. USYS$ORA_PARAMS = support obsolete 3gl services USYS$ORA_PARAMS = os Use Only supported to facilitate migration. May be discontinued in future versions of Uniface. Description Respond to ulda and uopenflag set by user-defined 3GL. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
